reviews.review_title: For what it is, it's decent.
reviews.review_description: You move side to side and squat, avoiding walls that come at you faster and faster. It has an interesting visual style, which I haven't seen any other game use (probably because it makes you feel like you're looking through a greasy window). I can't see myself coming back to it though, because there's no variety, and nothing else to do. There are pickups, but I think all they do is change the colors. If you want a very simple cardio workout including squats, this might be for you.
